requires.rationale: Action entity has explicit ECA triple

structure.description: Action authoring form composes (trigger event, filter predicate, action type, config). Examples: assertion-fails → Slack ping, dataset-tagged-PII → auto-policy, dataset-unused-90d → auto-deprecate. Reactive declarative rules surfaced as user-editable rows.

rationale.hypothesis: Imperative scripts for catalog automation rot. Event-condition-action triples are inspectable, composable, and naturally fit catalog events. Each rule reads as one English sentence.

counterexample.description: If no automation needed, ECA framework is overkill
